final:
module comparator_64bit (
    input [63:0] obf_A,
    input [63:0] B,
    output reg [1:0] result
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (obf_A > B)
            result = 2'b10; // obf_A is greater than B
        else if (obf_A < B)
            result = 2'b01; // obf_A is less than B
        else
            result = 2'b00; // obf_A is equal to B
    end
endmodule
